title: Business Expectations: Meetings / Email /  Conduct / Honor Code
description:
Download BUSINESS MEETINGS Conduct (F'25).pdf Download BUSINESS MEETINGS Conduct (F'25).pdf and save it to your computer.

Sign and fill out the requested information for the Honor Code and Business Meetings/ Email Conduct sections on the second page.

Print and Submit at the second class of the semester.
descriptionText:

Download BUSINESS MEETINGS Conduct (F'25).pdf and save it to your computer.
Sign and fill out the requested information for the Honor Code and Business Meetings/ Email Conduct sections on the second page.
Print and Submit at the second class of the semester.
